'''Divviks''' were small, gray, and dangerous creatures with multiple [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and sharp claws that were indigenous to a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

[[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] considered their [[Egg/Legends|egg]]-like pupae a delicacy, but once hatched, they become a venomous, ravenous nightmare. Impervious to [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shots and able to paralyze most [[Species/Legends|species]] with their venom, the divviks preferred to dine on live prey. It was said that their [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] saliva could melt through [[Plasteel/Legends|plasteel]], and crushing one would release toxic gases. A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] could seal the gaps. Divviks planted their [[Larva/Legends|larvae]] in the [[Brain/Legends|brains]] of living beings.

[[33 BBY/Legends|Six months before]] the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], approximately two thousand divvik pupae were on a [[Ephant Mon's freighter|freighter]] detained above [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], to be delivered to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. However, the grubs were too developed, and they all hatched. The crew was [[Death/Legends|killed]], and the only survivors were [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]], the [[Mundi family|daughter]] of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]; her boyfriend, [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]]; her friend, [[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]]; and [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]], hiding in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. Ki came in [[Ki-Adi-Mundi's starship|his starship]] and attempted to rescue them. Mon threatened to destroy them by firing the pods thrusters, causing it to explode against the closed external hatch. Maj was [[Blaster/Legends|shot]], and Ki manually opened the hatch, saving them.
